name: Combs Gold & Stuff
description_short: Combs Gold & Stuff is a pawn shop located in Indianapolis offering collateral-based loans and gold/jewelry buying services with flexible hours.
description_long: Combs Gold & Stuff operates as a traditional pawn shop in Indianapolis, Indiana, serving the West Washington Street corridor. The business has established itself in the collateral lending market, where customers can leverage personal items of value to access quick cash. Like most pawn operations, the company provides an alternative to traditional banking for consumers who need immediate funds or wish to sell valuables without navigating online marketplaces. The Indianapolis location on West Washington Street is positioned to serve the local community with in-person service. The business operates under a variable schedule throughout the week, remaining accessible for customer transactions during extended weekday hours. As a pawn shop, Combs Gold & Stuff likely engages in the purchase, sale, and lending activities typical of the industry, though specific service details beyond the core pawn model are not detailed in available materials. The company maintains a physical storefront presence with published contact information and hours, indicating a stable local operation. Customers seeking quick liquidity through asset-backed lending or looking to sell gold and jewelry can access these services in person. The main consideration for potential customers is that pawn transactions are fundamentally different from traditional loans—items are surrendered as collateral, and failure to repay results in loss of the item rather than credit reporting or collection activity. This model appeals to specific consumer needs but carries the inherent risk of asset forfeiture.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Published phone number (317-243-2303) for direct customer contact
Consistent operating hours with extended weekday availability until 5 PM Tuesday-Friday
Physical storefront location at 4004 W Washington St, Indianapolis, IN 46241
Saturday hours (9 AM-3 PM) accommodate working customers
Open on weekends, unlike many traditional lending institutions
No credit check or approval process required for collateral-based loans
Immediate access to cash upon successful transaction
cons: Limited hours on Monday and Saturday (closes at 3 PM) reduces accessibility for some customers
No website with service details, rates, or loan terms information available
Collateral forfeiture risk means inability to repay results in permanent loss of item
No information on interest rates, loan amounts, or repayment terms provided
Pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash against personal valuables or jewelry
Consumers who want to sell gold or jewelry without online sales hassle
People with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional loans but have collateral
Those seeking short-term liquidity without credit checks or underwriting delays
diagnosis: Combs Gold & Stuff is best suited for consumers who own valuable items (jewelry, gold, electronics) and need immediate cash without credit approval. The main caveat is that pawn transactions result in forfeiture of items if loans aren't repaid, making this appropriate only for those who can afford repayment or are comfortable selling the collateral permanently.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
